prompt: You are maintaining sglang-jax Chinese architecture docs. In an isolated copy of /Users/lianfang/primatrix, simulate a scheduler change that moves part of prefill token budgeting from sglang-jax/srt/managers/scheduler.py into sglang-jax/srt/managers/schedule_batch.py. Update the wiki docs as appropriate. Before editing, report docs impact and an update plan. After editing, report validation. Save all changed files and final report under outputs/.
assertions: Considers 04-model-executor.md only if the batch-to-worker boundary is affected
Uses section restructuring when a simple appended note would make the scheduler chapter patchy
Explains why overview docs are or are not updated
